semantic.role: Defines the structural, coding, testing, and documentation conventions for the ArchSpine project, including how to interact with the ArchSpine context system.
responsibilities: Describing the project directory layout and module organization
Listing build, test, and development commands
Specifying TypeScript coding style and naming conventions
Defining commit and pull request conventions
Explaining documentation maintenance and the role of the temporary working area
Providing instructions for using the ArchSpine context system
outOfScope: Detailed API reference or function-level documentation
Architecture design rationale or planning documents
Third-party dependency licenses or security policies

English.purpose: This document serves as the central reference for all contributors to the ArchSpine repository. It establishes the ground rules for project structure, coding style, testing, documentation, and how to leverage the built-in ArchSpine context system for efficient development.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience is any developer or maintainer working on the ArchSpine codebase. It is particularly important for new contributors who need to understand the project's conventions and for all team members to ensure consistency across contributions. The document also provides critical instructions for AI agents on how to interact with the ArchSpine context files.
key_takeaways: The project follows a strict modular structure under `src/` with clear separation of concerns (CLI, core, services, infra).
All code must adhere to the defined TypeScript style: ES modules, strict typing, 2-space indentation, and specific naming conventions.
Testing is mandatory for all behavior changes, using Vitest, with research fixtures kept separate from the main test suite.
Commits must follow Conventional Commits format, and PRs must include verification steps and related issue links.
Documentation changes must keep English and Chinese versions aligned; a temporary working area (`docs/temporary-to-be-cleared/`) is the source of truth for interim change notes.
AI agents and developers must consult the ArchSpine context (`.spine/atlas/`, `.spine/view/pages/`) before broad searches, and must not directly modify generated ArchSpine output files.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 仓库所有贡献者的核心参考指南。它确立了项目结构、编码风格、测试、文档以及如何利用内置的 ArchSpine 上下文系统进行高效开发的基本规则。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标读者是任何在 ArchSpine 代码库上工作的开发者或维护者。对于需要了解项目约定的新贡献者，以及为确保所有贡献一致性的团队成员来说，本文档尤为重要。此外，本文档还为 AI 代理提供了关于如何与 ArchSpine 上下文文件交互的关键指令。
key_takeaways: 项目遵循 `src/` 下的严格模块化结构，职责划分清晰（CLI、核心、服务、基础设施）。
所有代码必须遵守定义的 TypeScript 风格：ES 模块、严格类型、2 空格缩进以及特定的命名约定。
所有行为变更都必须进行测试，使用 Vitest，研究用的测试夹具应与主测试套件分开存放。
提交信息必须遵循 Conventional Commits 格式，拉取请求必须包含验证步骤和相关问题链接。
文档变更必须保持英文和中文版本对齐；临时工作区（`docs/temporary-to-be-cleared/`）是临时变更记录的唯一真实来源。
AI 代理和开发者在进行广泛搜索前，必须先查阅 ArchSpine 上下文（`.spine/atlas/`、`.spine/view/pages/`），并且不得直接修改 ArchSpine 生成的输出文件。
